prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为317→317→286→313→827名，2021–2024年稳定在286–317名区间，2025年因专业组（103）应用生物科学（农学）拉低 至827名，基准位次大幅后移；该校在陕西物理类招生计划2021年48人、2022年48人、2023年48人、2024年48人、2025年52人；2026年计划增至76人，较2 025年扩招约46.2%，扩招幅度显著，但考生规模同步大幅增长。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第3名，属于全国顶尖高校 层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风、校园安全等事件，但浙大作为顶尖名校，声誉波动对报考热度影响有限；抖 音热度排名第14位（高热），短视频平台关注度较高，反映报考关注度持续升温；浙大拥有A+学科11个（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学 工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、化学工程与技术、机械工程、植物保护、生态学、药学等），A类及以上学科共39个，学科实力顶尖，对考生吸引力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 浙江大学位于浙江杭州，属东部沿海发达地区，对陕西考生有较强跨省吸引力；计算机类（推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）、临床医学（推荐）等工科热门专业热度高；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025 年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次827名（受农学专业组拉低）、2026年大幅扩招约46.2%使位次后移、本省物理类考生增加约 19.7%使竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次与高热抖音关注度支撑报考热度，预计2026年最低位次约1076名，区间947–1205名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 317 → 317 → 286 → 313 → 827 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, it stabilized in the 286–317 range. In 2025, due to the major group (103) Applied Biological Science (Agriculture) lowering it to 827, the baseline ranking shifted significantly backward. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shaanxi was 48 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 52 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 76, an expansion of about 46.2% compared to 2025, a significant increase, but the number of examinees also grows substantially simultaneously.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, placing it among the top-tier universities in the country, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety, but as a top prestigious university, reputation fluctuations have limited impact on application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with relatively high attention on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising application interest. Zhejiang University has 11 A+ disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Plant Protection, Ecology, Pharmacy, etc.), and a total of 39 A-level and above disciplines, with top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, a developed region on the eastern coast, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi candidates. Popular majors include Computer Science (recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), and Clinical Medicine (recommended). In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 827 (lowered by the Agriculture major group), the significant expansion of about 46.2% in 2026 pushing rankings backward, the increase of about 19.7% in Physics Category examinees in the province intensifying competition, and the top-tier university level and high Douyin popularity supporting application enthusiasm, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1076, with a range of 947–1205.

- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Materials, Chemical Engineering and Polymers).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (947–1205), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Turing Class, Robotics Engineering, etc.) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 947), you can focus on aiming for Chu Kochen Honors College related high-heat majors.
